seo.title: Consulting | Beth Motley, MD
seo.description: Dr. Motley helps healthcare systems, private practices, and corporations implement evidence-based lifestyle medicine programs. Group visit design, provider training, and more.

hero.headline: Bring Lifestyle Medicine to Your Organization
hero.subheadline: Dr. Motley partners with healthcare systems, private practices, and employers to design and implement evidence-based lifestyle medicine programs that improve outcomes and reduce costs.

whoIHelp.title: Who I Help
whoIHelp.subtitle: Consulting services for organizations ready to invest in lifestyle medicine

items.title: Healthcare Systems & Hospitals
items.description: Implement lifestyle medicine programs within your health system. From pilot programs to enterprise-wide rollouts, Dr. Motley helps you build group visit models that improve patient outcomes, increase engagement, and generate sustainable revenue.

items.title: Private Practices
items.description: Add group medical visits and lifestyle medicine services to your existing practice. Dr. Motley provides the curriculum, workflow design, and training you need to launch confidently — without starting from scratch.

items.title: Corporate Wellness
items.description: Move beyond step-count challenges and lunch-and-learns. Dr. Motley helps employers build evidence-based wellness programs that measurably improve employee health, reduce healthcare spending, and boost productivity.

whatIOffer.title: What I Offer
whatIOffer.subtitle: Practical, hands-on consulting built on real clinical experience

items.title: Program Design & Curriculum Development
items.description: Turnkey curriculum for group medical visits, diabetes reversal programs, and lifestyle medicine interventions — built on evidence and tested in practice.

items.title: Group Visit Implementation & Training
items.description: Step-by-step guidance on launching shared medical appointments in your setting, including scheduling, billing, documentation, and group facilitation.

items.title: Provider Education & CME
items.description: Training for physicians, advanced practice providers, and care teams on lifestyle medicine principles, motivational interviewing, and group facilitation.

items.title: Workflow & Operations Consulting
items.description: Optimize your clinical workflows, EHR templates, patient enrollment processes, and team roles to make lifestyle medicine sustainable within your organization.

items.title: Remote & In-Person Options
items.description: Consulting is available virtually or on-site depending on your needs. Many engagements combine both for maximum flexibility and impact.

items.title: Outcomes Measurement & Reporting
items.description: Establish the metrics that matter, build data collection into your workflows, and create reporting frameworks that demonstrate program value to leadership.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A straightforward process from first conversation to implementation

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: A complimentary 30-minute conversation to understand your organization, your goals, and the challenges you are trying to solve. No pitch, no pressure — just a candid discussion about whether working together makes sense.

steps.title: Custom Proposal
steps.description: Based on our conversation, Dr. Motley prepares a detailed proposal outlining the scope of work, timeline, deliverables, and investment. Every engagement is tailored to your specific situation — there are no off-the-shelf packages.

steps.title: Implementation & Support
steps.description: Once we agree on a plan, Dr. Motley works alongside your team to bring it to life. This is not a report that sits on a shelf — it is hands-on partnership with ongoing support until your program is running confidently.

providerTools.title: Free Provider Tools
providerTools.subtitle: Resources for physicians and healthcare professionals implementing lifestyle medicine

items.title: Handouts & Teaching Aids
items.description: Patient handouts, teaching materials, and clinical tools for incorporating lifestyle medicine into your practice.

items.title: Implementation Talk
items.description: "Provider Tools for Implementing Lifestyle Medicine in Clinical Practice" — comprehensive ACLM conference presentation.

items.title: ACLM Interview
items.description: Dr. Motley's interview with the American College of Lifestyle Medicine on her career path and guidance for aspiring LM physicians.

contactForm.title: Start the Conversation
contactForm.subtitle: Interested in bringing lifestyle medicine to your organization? Tell us about your goals and we will be in touch to schedule a discovery call.
contactForm.note: Please select "Consulting inquiry" as your inquiry type below.
